citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:57 PM on 22
April 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by calling multiple numbers, left voicemails and sent emails
to try to reach the compliance officer with no response. After waiting over 30 minutes, the inspector tried to call again with
no response. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.38(b) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:57 PM on 22 
April 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the registrant by calling multiple numbers, left voicemails and sent emails 
to try to reach the compliance officer with no response. After waiting over 30 minutes, the inspector tried to call again with 
no response. Failure to provide access to the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and 
regulations. Continued failure to provide access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
